productOptionsHtml:
Use this section for ordering rules: style number, price band, minimums, and stated production time from the supplier catalog. Final invoice may reflect decoration, proofs, rush, or freight.

Catalog highlights

  • Golf Gatefold Photo Folders
  • Accommodates 4x6 or 5x7 photos
  • USA made
  • Vertical or horizontal formats
  • Includes your gold or silver foil-stamped imprint

Patch options (supplier)

Options and add-ons from the live Distributor Central product page for this SKU. Pricing may change; confirm on your quote.

Format-Photo Size ▼

Please order by the specific style number below.

PF5850

Format-Photo Size

Horizontal for 4" x 6" Photo: PF5850H-46<BR> Horizontal for 5" x 7" Photo: PF5850H-57<BR> Horizontal Imprint: One color gold or silver foil-stamp in a 3"w x 5"h area on either front panel<br>

PF5850

Format-Photo Size

Vertical for 4" x 6" Photo: PF5850V-46<BR> Vertical for 5" x 7" Photo: PF5850V-57<BR> Vertical Imprint: One color gold or silver foil-stamp in a 2 1/2"w x 7"h area on either front panel<br>

Copy Change ▼

Copy Change fee per change, per imprint color for calendars, frames, cards and pouches. Minimum quantity per change is 150 pieces. Change of copy not available with offset ink printed presentation folders.

No line choices listed—contact the studio for this add-on.

Drop Shipments ▼

Add per additional destination after the first. Minimum quantities per drop shipment may apply based on product. Drop shipments may increase lead time.

No line choices listed—contact the studio for this add-on.

Less than Minimum Charge ▼

Add below charge for orders for less than minimum quantity. Absolute minimum on Value Stick™ & Easy Stick™ calendars is 150. Absolute minimum on Foil Imprinted Folders is 150. Absolute minimum on Ink Printed Folders is 250.

Less Than Minimum

Proofs ▼

E-Mailed Proofs: No charge for 1st proof, $26.00(D) each after the 1st. Finished Product Proof: $53.00(D) per imprint color. NOTE: Proofs are sent only when requested on your PO. After September 1st only e-mailed proofs will be supplied. Proofs can delay production and signed proofs must be returned before production begins and standard lead times then take effect. Credit will not be issued on errors after the factory has received final proof approval.

Proofs - Standard Foil

No Imprint Price ▼

Use prices below for non-imprinted products in any format.

PF5850 - No Imprint

Standard Imprint - Foil-Stamp ▼

Products are shown with the standard imprint color for that product. For imprint colors other than standard there will be a charge of $39.00(D) per color, per order. PMS color match is not available with foil-stamped imprints.

Standard Imprint Color - Foil-Stamp

Standard Imprint - Foil-Stamp ▼

Products are shown with the standard imprint color for that product. For imprint colors other than standard there will be a charge of $39.00(D) per color, per order. PMS color match is not available with foil-stamped imprints.

Standard Imprint Color - Foil-Stamp

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Golf Gatefold Folder – Vertical or Horizontal. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style PF5850 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 13 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 50 units (per catalog line).
